programme.desc: One-of-a-kind crimes are often met with one-of-a-kind punishments; like a pig whose bloody rampage lands itself in the courtroom, or a music enthusiast whose wall-rattling beats subject them to hours of classical symphonies.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of successful prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes; from a man who frees himself all thanks to a stone fruit, to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Human bones as a "miracle cure" for gout; living mummies buried alive; a truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight -- with tapeworms; from daily rites to once-in-a-lifetime rituals, the stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From a dog's space voyage, to a harrowing story of Arctic survival, to various trips through time; journeys so extraordinary that they are truly unbelievable.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Accidents happen all the time, but every so often, a few defy logic and leave the world stunned; from a man blasted by a high-pressure air hose, to a lumberjack who survived near decapitation, they border on the impossible.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From riding massive tree trunks down a treacherous slope, to hosting a barrage of monkeys for an all-you-can-eat buffet, to a food fight of epic proportions; these are the stories of history's most bizarre and extraordinary traditions.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From calling Veteran's Stadium home, to setting up camp in an airport terminal, to turning an unassuming dumpster into a luxurious abode, each of these dwellings are so beyond odd, that they are truly unbelievable.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From a piece of the International Space Station crashing into a Florida home, to the first chimpanzee blasted into space, to a mind-bending timeslip experienced by two women in Versailles--this episode dives into the unbelievable stories that challenge what we think we know about our place in the universe.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: When the sun sets, strange things come alive. programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Could a pulsating light seen over Cuba be a UFO? A creature is seen swimming in a New York lake. Is there an American "Loch Ness" Monster? Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the evidence to find the answers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Crazy Fun Park
programme.desc: The Fun Kids nervously watch as Chester prepares to make a choice that will change all of their 'lives' forever.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell reveals he has a double standard when it comes to his children and the opposite sex. S1 E14

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy keeps a secret.

programme.title: Dress The Nation
programme.desc: Guest expert Frankie Bridge joins hosts Vernon Kay & AJ Odudu as the remaining designers continue to compete for a dream mentorship in the second womenswear week.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the teams create Wonka-inspired chocolate bars fit for Hollywood and edible 'floating cities'. Who'll make a splash and float on cloud nine into the final?

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actors James McAvoy and Gugu Mbatha-Raw, actor singer and producer Rita Wilson and comedian Russell Howard.

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Pulse host the Magic from TSB Arena in Wellington.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: America's votes reveal which three acts from the previous night's show will move on to the semifinals; also advancing is one act that was sent straight to the finals last night.

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second match in the opening round of the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Tactix host the Steel from Wolfbrook Arena in Christchurch.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: Eleven acts compete, and a live show golden buzzer will send one act directly to the finals.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: A successful lawyer's entire career is built on the basis of lies. His life takes an ugly turn when his son wishes for him to not lie for a day and his wish comes true. Starring Jim Carrey. (1997)

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Fall
programme.desc: A man falls to his death out of his remote chalet window, with his wife (Sandra Hüller) as the only possible suspect, and the only one who knows the truth. (2024)

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Delve into some of the most shocking murder cases, where the killer comes as a complete surprise. Just when the investigators think they've cracked the case, new evidence turns everything on its head.

programme.title: 911 Crisis Centre
programme.desc: At a 911 call centre in Cleveland, Ohio, every moment counts - as a team of dispatchers answer and triage the never-ending bombardment of panic-stricken calls.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.
